title: Extreme Natural Disasters
description: Extreme natural disasters like volcanoes and faults, earthquakes and sinkholes. Inspired by the general disasters mod. Includes experimental solar, flood, and snow apocalypses.
body:
Extreme natural disasters like volcanoes and earthquakes and sinkholes. Inspired by the general disasters mod, but only needed server-side to function.

 
![tectonic map v2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa4887234ec45f2b38ca87033c2b266988702745.png)
Simulates different tectonic plate boundries for volcano and earthquake spawns, unstable aquifer points for sinkhole spawns.
use 
```
"/endisaster tectonicmap"
```
 while holding a map to have them drawn on the map for you.

Tectonic plate movement is not simulated because it would be super laggy and you wont be able to base permanently anywhere safe.



Volcanoes:
![volcanoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52c9306eaa8c176fbf479e05b9f162ccc1bb5e84_0.webp)

Sinkholes:
![sinkhole](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ba143a4404bca6507b70e01fdc8248a550e4d6e_0.webp)

Earthquakes:
![earthquake/fault](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e4f5abbd89fff3acfd5bd59e5cf49b5c07b26d1_0.webp)

Faults:
![fault line types](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24f5fa6017f47659e58b37914576525fde0b9f5c_0.webp)

experimental/wip apocalypses:
Flood (most functional one at the moment): floods the world, direct pallete editing for new and loaded chunks for less lag from flooding.
Solar: classic solar apocalypse with extra steps. block conversions are user-definable in config.
Snow : covers the world in snow, direct pallete editing for new and loaded chunks for less lag from snow. (least functional right now, does not work properly at all)
